title: EQ - Saved Custom EQ, reset defaults - returns to Bass, but leaves custom not saved
scenario: Custom EQ settings are lost and sliders reset to default after performing Reset Defaults from Device Settings on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Adjust slider values to create a custom EQ profile
Navigate back to Audio Settings → Equalizer
expected: After resetting defaults, the EQ display should show the custom EQ profile that was previously saved, with the slider values retaining the custom settings.
